INCOME AND EXPENSE DECLARATION FILED BY RESPONDENT SCHARF, NANCY I

N/A BY PETITIONER. KATHY RICHARDS WITH RESPONDENT. RESPONDENT CONTENDS THAT PETITIONER IS IN ARREARS FOR CHILD CARE COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,686.25. AMOUNT OF ARREARAGE FOR CHILD CARE WAS CONFIRMED BY THE COURT. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT ORDERED PETITIONER TO PAY THE AFORE-MENTIONED ARREARAGE @ AN AVERAGE OF $200.00 PER MONTH THROUGH WAGE ASSIGNMENT. ADDITIONALLY, PETITIONER SHALL PAY AN ADDITIONAL $200.00 PER MONTH FOR CHILD CARE COSTS BY WAY OF WAGE ASSIGNMENT. COURT GRANTED COUNSEL'S REQUEST FOR AF & COSTS IS GRANTED. PETITIONER SHALL PAY RESPONDENT AF & COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $848.00 BY WAY OF WAGE ASSIGNMENT. COUNSEL FOR RESPONDENT SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER AFTER HEARING. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LORETTA NAJERA, CSR #5153.
